tweets.content: There are no American flags, but there are flags of many other countries. Those whose loyalty is to another country over America are, by definition, traitors and must be expelled immediately.

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Originally USAID was a slush fund invented in 1964 during the cold war under the Johnson Doctrine. An election fund to prevent communist and Socialist regimes from the Western Hemisphere. Mainly Central and South America.. Democrats abused and perverted USAID to elect Socialist and Communist fegimes in the western hemisphere. And radical Islamic Regimes in Northwest Africa This phenomenon isn't immediately apparent but a map. And the dates of the elections shows a trend.
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：美国国际开发署最初是 1964 年冷战时期约翰逊主义下发明的行贿基金。防止共产主义和社会主义政权侵入西半球的选举基金。主要是中美洲和南美洲。民主党人滥用和歪曲美国国际开发署，在西半球选举社会主义和共产主义领导人。西北非的激进伊斯兰政权这种现象并不是立即显现出来的，而是一张地图。 And the dates of the elections shows a trend.

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: How is that last sentence possible? "His net worth jumped $47 BILLION in a single year even as crypto prices fell over 50%."
tweets.translated: RT @cz_binance：最后一句话怎么可能？ “尽管加密货币价格下跌了 50% 以上，但他的净资产在一年内飙升了 470 亿美元。”

tweets.content: Just back from the Philippines. One of the most exciting digital asset markets in SEA right now, jumping to 4th globally in TRM Labs' Country Crypto Adoption Index. Their regulators get it. Collaborative, forward-thinking, focused on outcomes: consumer protection, innovation, growth. Rare combo. Met great people at the Department of Finance including Secretary Frederick Go, the SEC’s Chairman Francis Lim, and the BlockShoals team. Real conversations about where the industry is heading. Big one: the SEC's PhiliFintech Innovation Office just gave BlockShoals in-principle approval under StratBox. This is what good regulation looks like. Build pathways, not walls. Programs like that signal that the Philippines is serious. Confidence attracts capital. Capital funds innovation. Flywheel starts here. Bullish on the Philippines. And crypto - buying the dip. More soon. 🇵🇭
tweets.translated: 刚从菲律宾回来。目前是东南亚最令人兴奋的数字资产市场之一，在 TRM Labs 的国家加密货币采用指数中跃升至全球第四位。他们的监管者明白了。协作、前瞻性思维、注重成果：消费者保护、创新、增长。罕见的组合。会见了财政部长 Frederick Go、SEC 主席 Francis Lim 和 BlockShoals 团队等杰出人士。关于行业发展方向的真实对话。重大事件：SEC 的 PhiliFintech 创新办公室刚刚在 StratBox 下原则上批准了 BlockShoals。这就是良好监管的样子。建造道路，而不是墙壁。类似的节目表明菲律宾是认真的。信心吸引资本。资本资助创新。飞轮从这里开始。看好菲律宾。还有加密货币——逢低买入。很快就会有更多。 🇵🇭

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Japan's Rakuten to establish joint venture with $ASTS to build out LEO satellite networks for Japan per Digitimes/Nikkei. "The move is widely viewed as a strategic response to the growing influence of $SPCX Starlink in Japan"
tweets.translated: 据 Digitimes/Nikkei 报道，日本乐天公司将与 $ASTS 成立合资企业，为日本建设 LEO 卫星网络。 “此举被广泛视为对 $SPCX Starlink 在日本日益增长的影响力的战略回应”

tweets.content: $GM cuts 1,000 workers and replaces them with 50 robots (Jun 22nd report) Reports also show GM is working on a deal with $NVDA on factory robotics. This is industry validation for robotics, since it likely demonstrates increased opex margins + efficiency from employee automation. Especially from companies like $AMZN to General Motors with assembly/warehouse lines that have high headcount. I think the technology is already here and use cases are already proven. Robotics/Humanoids are just pre-scale right now. The wording from large companies is “assistive robotics”… But in all honesty, it’s here to automate away the human workforce and increase profitability. I don’t think companies want to be paying insurance, salaries, etc. when robots can do a better job, and 24/7, so very sad to see potential job losses in the future from robotics automation. Whether people like it or not; seems like the inflection point for robotics is here.
tweets.translated: $GM 裁员 1,000 名，并用 50 台机器人取代他们（6 月 22 日报道） 报道还显示，通用汽车正在与 $NVDA 就工厂机器人技术达成一项协议。这是对机器人技术的行业验证，因为它可能证明了员工自动化带来的运营支出利润率和效率的提高。尤其是像 $AMZN 和通用汽车这样拥有大量员工的装配/仓库生产线的公司。我认为这项技术已经存在并且用例已经得到验证。机器人/人形机器人目前只是预规模。大公司的措辞是“辅助机器人”……但老实说，它的目的是自动化劳动力并提高盈利能力。我认为当机器人可以做得更好、24/7 时，公司不想支付保险、工资等，所以非常遗憾地看到机器人自动化未来可能会导致失业。不管人们喜欢与否；机器人技术的拐点似乎已经到来。

tweets.content: Just some notes on $POET AGM and read through on optical markets: - "The top three laser suppliers control 68% of the market, and they’re completely sold out for the next two years" $LITE CEO said into 2028, so POET implicitly confirms laser shortage is going into 2029 now. - NRE with a new customer, building on POET’s interposer for high-power external light source. This is high confidence $SIVE as laser supplier given the Sept 29, 2025 PR on ELS, and new customer qualification would be material for revenue if it goes into volume ramp. - Poet expects Lumilens commercial agreement to scale to over $500 million over the next 5 years. Lumilens claimed a top-3 hyperscaler was their initial customer (Linkedin OSINT) - $830M cash on hand on balance sheet (this is more for Poet fundamentals). - "The entire optical components industry today is facing a severe shortage of critical components." Reaffirming what we know already regarding optical bottlenecks. - "Production ramp in the second half of 2026 this year." Just production timelines H2. In terms of $POET volumes: - existing capacity around 1 million optical engines per year - projected demand exiting 2027 around 1 million optical engines per month - roughly 10x capacity expansion I don't own Poet, but if management delivers on these projections it directionally looks very positive. However something to note is that unlike other suppliers that have named hyperscaler customers to to back up capacity revenues like $AAOI: $POET seems more questionable. But this does look like a very positive outlook for $POET if they match projections.
tweets.translated: 只是 $POET 年度股东大会上的一些说明，并通读光学市场： - “三大激光器供应商控制着 68% 的市场，他们在未来两年内将完全售空”$LITE 首席执行官表示，到 2028 年，因此 POET 含蓄地确认激光器短缺将持续到 2029 年。 - 与新客户合作的 NRE，基于 POET 的高功率外部光源中介层。鉴于 2025 年 9 月 29 日在 ELS 上发布的 PR，$SIVE 作为激光供应商具有很高的信心，如果产量增加，新的客户资格将对其收入产生重大影响。 - Poet 预计 Lumilens 的商业协议将在未来 5 年内扩大到 5 亿美元以上。 Lumilens 声称排名前 3 的超大规模提供商是他们的初始客户 (Linkedin OSINT) - 资产负债表上手头有 8.3 亿美元现金（这更多的是 Poet 的基本面）。 - “当今整个光学元件行业正面临着关键元件的严重短缺。”重申我们已经了解的有关光学瓶颈的知识。 - “今年 2026 年下半年产量将有所增加。”只是生产时间表H2。就 POET 数量而言： - 现有产能每年约 100 万个光学引擎 - 预计 2027 年退出的需求每月约 100 万个光学引擎 - 产能扩张约 10 倍 我不拥有 Poet，但如果管理层实现这些预测，它看起来非常积极。然而值得注意的是，与其他指定超大规模客户来支持容量收入（如 $AAOI）的供应商不同：$POET 似乎更值得怀疑。但如果 $POET 与预测相符，这看起来确实是一个非常积极的前景。
